Set 1.question: I love being the center of attention in a group or classroom.
I get bored easily if I am left alone for too long.
I like to take charge and lead group projects or games.
I speak up immediately when I disagree with someone.
I get upset or angry quickly if things don't go my way.
I worry a lot about making mistakes or getting bad grades.
I take it very hard if I feel a friend is upset with me.
I prefer spending my free time doing quiet things by myself.
I am very patient and almost never get angry at my peers.
I prefer to let others make the decisions so there is no conflict.

Set 2.question: I am usually the loudest or most talkative person at lunch or recess.
I am always looking for new friends to play or chat with.
I love competitive games where I have a chance to win or beat others.
I like giving directions to other kids during group activities.
I get super annoyed if people work too slowly or don't follow my pace.

I get very nervous right before I have to speak in front of the class.
I find big crowds of kids draining and need quiet time to recharge.
I am very good at keeping my cool even when everyone else is panicking.
I happily go along with whatever game or movie my friends choose.

Set 3.question: I learn best when I can talk out loud and share ideas with a partner.
I love surprises and sudden changes to my daily school schedule.
I like setting high goals for myself, like getting the highest score on a test.

I prefer working on independent school projects rather than in a large group.
I rarely feel rushed or stressed about deadlines or homework.
I am perfectly fine sitting back and letting other kids lead a presentation.

Set 4.question: I enjoy making a crowd laugh by telling jokes or acting silly.
I hate missing out on a social event or hangouts with friends.
I tend to step in and fix problems for my friends without them asking.
I am very upfront and honest, even if it hurts someone's feelings a little.
I get impatient when my friends cannot make up their minds quickly.
I worry that other kids might be talking about me behind my back.
I take criticism very personally and feel hurt easily.
I only like sharing my true thoughts with one or two trusted best friends.
I am usually the peacemaker who helps resolve fights between friends.
I prefer to hide in the background during class discussions.

I am an open book; everyone always knows exactly what I am feeling.
I get an energy rush when I am faced with a difficult challenge.

I frequently feel overwhelmed by the amount of things I have to do.
I like spending recess reading, drawing, or daydreaming by myself.
I have a relaxed, easy-going attitude toward rules and expectations.
I rarely speak unless I am directly called on by a teacher.

Set 6.question: I love trying new sports, clubs, or activities just to see what they are like.

I prefer creative hobbies I can do completely alone, like writing or coding.
I don't hold grudges and can easily forgive a classmate who treats me unfairly.
I like hanging out with groups only if I can just listen without talking much.

I routinely sign up for things instantly without checking my schedule first.

I say "yes" to fun plans instantly without wondering if I have homework.
